mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS songId, s.name AS songName, s.album AS album, s.lyric AS lyric, s.duration AS duration, s.style AS style, s.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.audio_url AS audioUrl, s.release_time AS releaseTime, a.name AS artistName FROM tb_song s LEFT JOIN tb_artist a ON s.artist_id = a.id
and s.artist_id=#{artistId}
and s.song_name like concat('%',#{songName},'%')
and s.album like concat('%',#{album},'%')
ORDER BY s.release_time DESC
